items.title: Compare modal resets when switching location
items.precondition: Logged in as admin; viewing a multi-location practice on /pmsStatistics where two locations have referral keyData with different months/values.
steps: 2. Click 'Compare' to open the Compare months modal.
3. Change the month pickers (and/or click 'Explain this comparison' to generate the AI paragraph).
5. Switch the active location to Location B (different data).
6. Click 'Compare' again to reopen the modal.
items.expected: On reopen, the month pickers default to Location B's most recent months (not Location A's picks), and the AI comparison paragraph is cleared (shows the 'Explain this comparison' prompt again). No Location A data is shown.

items.title: Within one location, selections persist across close/reopen
items.precondition: Logged in as admin; viewing a single location on /pmsStatistics with at least two months of referral data.
steps: 2. Change the month pickers to a non-default pair.
4. Reopen the modal (same location, no location switch).
items.expected: The previously picked month pair is still selected — no unintended reset when the location did not change.
